name: Swiss Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (6 oz) container frozen avocado dip
4 oz (1 cup) Shredded Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and milk. Stir in chicken, onions, 1/4 cup almonds, and 1/2 cup Jack cheese.
3. Heat tortillas according to package directions.
4. Spoon about 1/4 cup filling down the center of each warm tortilla; roll up. Place seam side down in an ungreased 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
5. Pour enchilada sauce evenly over tortillas and sprinkle with remaining Jack cheese.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until bubbly.
7. In a small bowl, combine avocado dip and sour cream. Spoon over warm enchiladas.
8. Garnish with radishes or almonds.
Makes 10 enchiladas.
